title: Brush Electroplating, chemicals, formulas and equipment how to make it 2
description: In this video i finish showing you how to make the chemicals required to electroplate copper, brass, zinc, gold and silver onto steel copper zinc or aluminum. It's the same formula for any of these metals and relatively easy to make from household chemicals that you probably have already or can get down at any hardware store the video is split into two because of the youtube time constraint - sorry about that - somethings can't be done in 15 minutes.
